cards.correct_answer_hint: EC2 stands for Elastic Compute Cloud, it provides virtual servers
S3 is Simple Storage Service, object storage for any amount of data

cards.back: Serverless compute — run code without managing servers
cards.correct_answer_hint: Lambda is serverless compute, you run code without provisioning servers
IAM stands for Identity and Access Management, it controls who can access AWS resources

cards.front: What is an AWS Availability Zone?
cards.back: An isolated data-centre location within a region
cards.correct_answer_hint: An Availability Zone is an isolated data centre within a region

cards.back: Relational Database Service — managed SQL databases
cards.correct_answer_hint: RDS is the Relational Database Service, it manages SQL databases for you

cards.back: A CDN that caches content at edge locations globally
cards.correct_answer_hint: CloudFront is a content delivery network that caches content at edge locations around the world

cards.back: Virtual Private Cloud — isolated network in AWS
cards.correct_answer_hint: VPC is Virtual Private Cloud, your own isolated network inside AWS
